summary: Website for a haunted event with separate pages/sections (food booths, haunted houses, auditions, scare zones).

existing_features.title: Update the frontend styling so that all visible text across the entire website renders in white, including (but not limited to) the Food Booths section/pages, Haunted Houses section/pages, Auditions section and dedicated Auditions page, and Scare Zones section/pages.
Do not change any background colors or background media (images/videos/gradients) as part of the white-text update; only adjust text color styling.

new_feature_requests.summary: Set all website text color to white (including food booths, haunted houses, auditions, and scare zones pages/sections) without changing backgrounds

projectName: Make all website text white across all pages/sections
